text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, October 06. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and a quiet dinner with the family.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Doing some cleaning around the house. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Let's get that resolved. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I checked the telemetry feeds. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. That sounds like a sweet moment. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. That's a big step. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Let's organize the menu. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reading scientific papers late tonight. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I've indexed the research notes. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've noted the plans. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Bedtime can be a challenge. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Sounds exciting! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
